title: Consolidate test tiers: test, test-integration, test-external
description:
Refactor test organization into 3 clean tiers.

Current state:
- make test — unit tests (excludes internal/e2etest)
- make test-integration — specific named tests from internal/e2etest
- make test-e2e — TestE2E* from internal/e2etest (mix of library + subprocess)
- make test-stress, test-security, test-mutation, bench — subsets of internal/e2etest
- make test-external — black-box binary tests in tests/external/

Target state:
- make test — fast unit tests, per-package, no heavy suites
- make test-integration — ALL heavy cross-cutting library tests (property, fault,
  oracle, golden corpus, stress, security, mutation, benchmarks) in internal/integration/
- make test-external — ALL black-box binary tests in tests/external/

Work:
1. Rename internal/e2etest/ to internal/integration/ (update all imports, CLAUDE.md)
2. Move subprocess TestE2E* tests (hook mode, test mode binary tests) from
   internal/e2etest/e2e_test.go into tests/external/external_test.go
3. Consolidate Makefile: remove test-e2e, test-stress, test-security, test-mutation
   targets. test-integration runs all of internal/integration/. Keep bench/bench-full
   as separate convenience targets but they run from internal/integration/.
4. Update CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yaml) to use the 3 tiers
5. Update CLAUDE.md test category table
6. Update README.md test sections
7. Keep test-ci-tier1/2/3 scripts if they still work, or remove if redundant

References:
- Current Makefile targets and internal/e2etest/ contents
- tests/external/external_test.go (already done)
- CLAUDE.md test naming conventions table
